rationale: Educ. Code §30.055 governs employment contracts and salary structures for Texas School for the Deaf employees. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: The governing board of the school may enter into an employment contract with any employee who provides, or supervises any employee who provides, direct and regular educational services to students
_note: No conflict. The rule concerns employment terms for Texas School for the Deaf staff; the proposed change targets residential homestead property tax exemptions. The two provisions operate in unrelated statutory domains.
